headline: OpenAI files confidential S-1 with SEC, signals major ChatGPT overhaul
body: OpenAI has submitted a confidential S-1 filing to the SEC, moving toward a public offering while simultaneously planning a significant redesign of ChatGPT. For healthcare organizations, this IPO signals the maturing of large language models as enterprise infrastructure rather than experimental tools. The timing matters because hospitals and health systems currently evaluating AI vendors need clarity on OpenAI's long-term stability, pricing trajectory post-IPO, and how platform changes will affect existing clinical integrations. The ChatGPT overhaul suggests rapid feature evolution that healthcare IT teams must monitor closely to ensure their EHR workflows and compliance frameworks remain compatible with whatever new interface emerges.
